entity.summary: Bitcoin-focused non-custodial decentralized trading platform providing token swaps, spot markets, margin trading, liquidity pools, and related DeFi services across Rootstock and BOB.
entity.notes: Current first-party trading pages expose wallet-connected swaps, spot markets, margin trading, and AMM liquidity without custodial account sign-up. Current independently maintained metrics report non-zero DEX volume and TVL across Rootstock and BOB. HEI keeps Sovryn's swap, spot, margin, and Alpha trading surfaces under one Sovryn exchange entity while not treating its lending and governance products as separate exchanges. No exact launch date, legal jurisdiction, predecessor, successor, or terminal lifecycle fact is asserted.

evidence.title: Sovryn decentralized trading platform
evidence.notes: Current first-party trading page presents wallet-connected decentralized swaps, spot trading, margin trading, AMM execution, and liquidity functions.

evidence.title: Sovryn DEX protocol metrics
evidence.notes: Current protocol metrics report non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day DEX volume together with TVL across Rootstock and BOB, supporting active classification.
